scenarios.label: Public x402 (Base)
scenarios.description: Recorded x402 EIP-3009 settlements pulled from Base via Blockscout. The honest demo: real wallets, real flow, scoring computed live.

scenarios.label: Compromised agent (drift)
scenarios.description: Synthetic — agents start as well-behaved x402 payment bots and drift to a new counterparty + value pattern after t=8h. The classic 'compromised credential' fraud shape.

scenarios.label: Collusion ring
scenarios.description: Synthetic — three coordinated rings of 6-8 wallets each fire bursts within 60s windows on shared counterparties.

scenarios.label: Prompt-injected invoice
scenarios.description: Synthetic — agent reads a tampered invoice mid-window and diverts payments to an attacker wallet. The agentic-specific failure mode: action / intent mismatch.
